task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Standup Template' tiddler with required headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Standup Template' is visible, containing the headers '! Yesterday', '! Today', and '! Blockers'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Scrum Dashboard' tiddler.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Scrum Dashboard' is visible in the TiddlyWiki interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Scrum Dashboard' contains a button to create today's standup.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Scrum Dashboard' tiddler, there is a visible button labeled exactly 'Create Today's Standup'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Scrum Dashboard' displays a dynamic list of tiddlers tagged 'Standup'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Scrum Dashboard' displays a list of links to standup notes (e.g., historical dates and today's date), indicating a dynamic list based on the 'Standup' tag.

task_completion.description: Verify that today's standup tiddler was generated with the correct title and tag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new tiddler titled with the current date (format 'YYYY-0MM-0DD - Daily Standup') is visible and has a tag pill labeled 'Standup'.

task_completion.description: Verify today's standup contains the template headers and the required text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Today's standup tiddler contains the headers '! Yesterday', '! Today', and '! Blockers', with the text 'Configured the automated standup generator.' written under the '! Today' section.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the TiddlyWiki web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction within a web browser displaying TiddlyWiki, rather than terminal commands or external text editors creating files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the created button to generate the standup.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Create Today's Standup' button on the dashboard to generate the new tiddler, rather than creating it manually via the standard '+' button.

integrity.description: Verify the dynamic list is not hardcoded.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the edit view of 'Scrum Dashboard' is shown, it should contain TiddlyWiki macro/filter syntax (e.g., `<<list-links>>` or `<$list>`) rather than manually typed links to specific dates.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected dashboard title is 'Scrum Dashboard'. The expected template title is 'Standup Template'. The expected tag for standup notes is 'Standup'. The text to be inserted in today's note is 'Configured the automated standup generator.'.
